name: Natalia Kudryavtseva
title: Senior Software Engineer
tagline:
Building scalable, high-performance digital products
Focused on architecture, performance, and user experience
about:
Senior Software Engineer focused on building scalable, high-performance digital products.

I design and develop applications across platforms, with a strong emphasis on architecture, performance, and user experience.

My work includes building design systems, improving application performance, and shaping maintainable frontend architectures for complex products. I aim to create systems that scale effectively and remain robust as complexity grows.

projects.title: MyDiary
projects.subtitle: Personal Health & Productivity Tracker
projects.description: Full-stack web application for habit tracking, daily planning, and health monitoring with PWA capabilities.
highlights: Built complete CRUD system with API routes and database schema design
Implemented PWA with offline support and cache versioning
Created editable card system with real-time updates
Deployed production-ready app on Vercel with CI/CD pipeline

projects.title: Roberto / OpenClaw
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Personal Assistant
projects.description: Automation system with offline voice transcription and intelligent task management through Telegram interface.
highlights: Integrated offline speech-to-text pipeline with Whisper models
Built background job processing system for productivity workflows
Designed command interface for seamless voice-to-action automation
Optimized transcription performance for real-time use cases
